default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on client progress and address blockers for the week.](https://fathom.video/share/jg-CYmasyvtyH9-oYdymtRy1beY9WxHp?tab=summary&timestamp=26.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Navon:** A new product-led review process is required to bridge a stakeholder silo and avoid looping in the product team. Legal review is also a new bottleneck.](https://fathom.video/share/jg-CYmasyvtyH9-oYdymtRy1beY9WxHp?tab=summary&timestamp=581.0)
  - [**Process Improvement:** Add a "Delivery Date" to Airtable to track internal delivery vs. client feedback delays, enabling more accurate reporting.](https://fathom.video/share/jg-CYmasyvtyH9-oYdymtRy1beY9WxHp?tab=summary&timestamp=445.0)
  - [**Brex:** Kavishka will create 3 new assignments, prioritizing high-commercial-intent topics (e.g., listicles) to drive lower-funnel results.](https://fathom.video/share/jg-CYmasyvtyH9-oYdymtRy1beY9WxHp?tab=summary&timestamp=313.0)
  - [**Holiday Schedule:** No content will be delivered the week of Dec 29. Aida will inform all clients, and Andi will clarify Hex's final sprint week.](https://fathom.video/share/jg-CYmasyvtyH9-oYdymtRy1beY9WxHp?tab=summary&timestamp=1575.0)

## Topics

### Process & Admin

  - [**Handoff Documentation:** Priority is to tighten handoff docs for clients like Navon and Cresta (in week 5).](https://fathom.video/share/jg-CYmasyvtyH9-oYdymtRy1beY9WxHp?tab=summary&timestamp=26.0)
  - [**Airtable Tracking:** Add a "Delivery Date" column to the Content OS.](https://fathom.video/share/jg-CYmasyvtyH9-oYdymtRy1beY9WxHp?tab=summary&timestamp=445.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Distinguish internal delivery from client feedback delays, providing a more accurate performance narrative.](https://fathom.video/share/jg-CYmasyvtyH9-oYdymtRy1beY9WxHp?tab=summary&timestamp=515.0)
  - [**Holiday Delivery:** No content delivery the week of Dec 29.](https://fathom.video/share/jg-CYmasyvtyH9-oYdymtRy1beY9WxHp?tab=summary&timestamp=1575.0)
      - [**Action:** Aida to inform all Strategy Sprint clients.](https://fathom.video/share/jg-CYmasyvtyH9-oYdymtRy1beY9WxHp?tab=summary&timestamp=1630.0)

### Client Updates

#### Navon (Week 5)

  - [**New Requirements:**](https://fathom.video/share/jg-CYmasyvtyH9-oYdymtRy1beY9WxHp?tab=summary&timestamp=581.0)
      - [**Legal Review:** Required for all content due to the company's recent IPO.](https://fathom.video/share/jg-CYmasyvtyH9-oYdymtRy1beY9WxHp?tab=summary&timestamp=583.0)
          - [**Action:** Libby (client) to get legal team feedback on sensitive topics (e.g., data security, unsubstantiated claims).](https://fathom.video/share/jg-CYmasyvtyH9-oYdymtRy1beY9WxHp?tab=summary&timestamp=583.0)
      - [**Product-Led Review:** Required to bridge a silo between growth lead Nima and the content team.](https://fathom.video/share/jg-CYmasyvtyH9-oYdymtRy1beY9WxHp?tab=summary&timestamp=630.0)
          - [**Action:** Aida to define key products and positioning for each content cluster to guide the new review process.](https://fathom.video/share/jg-CYmasyvtyH9-oYdymtRy1beY9WxHp?tab=summary&timestamp=680.0)
  - [**Pipeline Automation:**](https://fathom.video/share/jg-CYmasyvtyH9-oYdymtRy1beY9WxHp?tab=summary&timestamp=855.0)
      - [**Action:** Loop in Kirkland to automate a disclaimer in the pipeline, similar to the Relay project.](https://fathom.video/share/jg-CYmasyvtyH9-oYdymtRy1beY9WxHp?tab=summary&timestamp=855.0)
      - [**Action:** Tamara to update the "Products & Services" artifact in Atlas with Navon's internal documentation.](https://fathom.video/share/jg-CYmasyvtyH9-oYdymtRy1beY9WxHp?tab=summary&timestamp=799.0)

#### Brex

  - [**Action:** Kavishka to create 3 new assignments and populate the content calendar.](https://fathom.video/share/jg-CYmasyvtyH9-oYdymtRy1beY9WxHp?tab=summary&timestamp=313.0)
      - [**Priority:** High-commercial-intent topics (e.g., listicles, comparisons) to drive lower-funnel results.](https://fathom.video/share/jg-CYmasyvtyH9-oYdymtRy1beY9WxHp?tab=summary&timestamp=376.0)
      - [**Constraint:** Avoid duplicating existing content; research keywords before creating assignments.](https://fathom.video/share/jg-CYmasyvtyH9-oYdymtRy1beY9WxHp?tab=summary&timestamp=376.0)

#### Cresta (Week 5)

  - [**Blocker:** Staging is paused until the client creates a new "resources" section on their site.](https://fathom.video/share/jg-CYmasyvtyH9-oYdymtRy1beY9WxHp?tab=summary&timestamp=983.0)
      - [**Action:** Aida to get a firm timeline from the client.](https://fathom.video/share/jg-CYmasyvtyH9-oYdymtRy1beY9WxHp?tab=summary&timestamp=983.0)
      - [**Escalation:** If delayed, flag for Tyler, who has a week 6 call scheduled.](https://fathom.video/share/jg-CYmasyvtyH9-oYdymtRy1beY9WxHp?tab=summary&timestamp=1035.0)

#### Redis

  - [**Stakeholder Change:** Cody (product lead) is no longer with the company.](https://fathom.video/share/jg-CYmasyvtyH9-oYdymtRy1beY9WxHp?tab=summary&timestamp=1412.0)
      - [**Impact:** New product reviewers are now providing feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/jg-CYmasyvtyH9-oYdymtRy1beY9WxHp?tab=summary&timestamp=1412.0)
      - [**Opportunity:** The client is open to eliminating product reviews if content quality is high.](https://fathom.video/share/jg-CYmasyvtyH9-oYdymtRy1beY9WxHp?tab=summary&timestamp=1470.0)
  - [**Production:** Gabby is producing 5 articles for this week.](https://fathom.video/share/jg-CYmasyvtyH9-oYdymtRy1beY9WxHp?tab=summary&timestamp=1504.0)

#### Hex

  - [**Production:** 4 articles published; 5 more sent.](https://fathom.video/share/jg-CYmasyvtyH9-oYdymtRy1beY9WxHp?tab=summary&timestamp=1273.0)
  - [**Feedback:** Product team edits on comparison articles are heavier but more constructive than before.](https://fathom.video/share/jg-CYmasyvtyH9-oYdymtRy1beY9WxHp?tab=summary&timestamp=1293.0)
  - [**Continuation:** A decision is needed by next Monday (Dec 22).](https://fathom.video/share/jg-CYmasyvtyH9-oYdymtRy1beY9WxHp?tab=summary&timestamp=1325.0)
      - [**Action:** Sydney to inform the new team (Khalil, Matt) during Thursday's handoff that continuation is pending.](https://fathom.video/share/jg-CYmasyvtyH9-oYdymtRy1beY9WxHp?tab=summary&timestamp=1325.0)

#### Airbyte

  - [**Production:** 5 new thought leadership articles published.](https://fathom.video/share/jg-CYmasyvtyH9-oYdymtRy1beY9WxHp?tab=summary&timestamp=1156.0)
  - [**Briefs:** Erik is creating new briefs to reflect a major rewrite of a content series.](https://fathom.video/share/jg-CYmasyvtyH9-oYdymtRy1beY9WxHp?tab=summary&timestamp=1173.0)
  - [**Post-Sprint:** Erik meets with Mario tomorrow to discuss the full scope of work.](https://fathom.video/share/jg-CYmasyvtyH9-oYdymtRy1beY9WxHp?tab=summary&timestamp=1187.0)

#### Viscom

  - [**Blocker:** Staging is paused pending access to the client's new CMS.](https://fathom.video/share/jg-CYmasyvtyH9-oYdymtRy1beY9WxHp?tab=summary&timestamp=1071.0)
      - [**Action:** Sydney to stage 5 articles immediately upon gaining access to begin tracking signals.](https://fathom.video/share/jg-CYmasyvtyH9-oYdymtRy1beY9WxHp?tab=summary&timestamp=1098.0)

#### Turnstile & BlackSol

  - [**Content Strategy:** Aida is training William and Kathy to lead the content strategy process for these clients.](https://fathom.video/share/jg-CYmasyvtyH9-oYdymtRy1beY9WxHp?tab=summary&timestamp=159.0)

  - [**BlackSol:** Product deep dive completed Friday.](https://fathom.video/share/jg-CYmasyvtyH9-oYdymtRy1beY9WxHp?tab=summary&timestamp=109.0)
      - [**Action:** William to follow up on scheduling the content strategy session.](https://fathom.video/share/jg-CYmasyvtyH9-oYdymtRy1beY9WxHp?tab=summary&timestamp=214.0)

#### Ramp

  - [**Production:** Hassan is publishing articles ASAP per client directive.](https://fathom.video/share/jg-CYmasyvtyH9-oYdymtRy1beY9WxHp?tab=summary&timestamp=247.0)

#### Read AI

  - [**Production:** 2 more articles published; clicks are coming in.](https://fathom.video/share/jg-CYmasyvtyH9-oYdymtRy1beY9WxHp?tab=summary&timestamp=1221.0)
  - [**Continuation:** A decision is pending.](https://fathom.video/share/jg-CYmasyvtyH9-oYdymtRy1beY9WxHp?tab=summary&timestamp=1252.0)
      - [**Action:** Aida to follow up this week.](https://fathom.video/share/jg-CYmasyvtyH9-oYdymtRy1beY9WxHp?tab=summary&timestamp=1252.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Aida:**](https://fathom.video/share/jg-CYmasyvtyH9-oYdymtRy1beY9WxHp?tab=summary&timestamp=581.0)
